name: Yinhua CSI Equal Weight 90 Index Graded Fund
summary: Yinhua CSI Equal Weight 90 Index Graded Fund is an index fund that tracks the performance of the CSI Equal Weight 90 Index and is structured as a graded fund. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to a portfolio of 90 stocks with equal weightings. It is managed by Yinhua Fund Management Co., Ltd., headquartered in China.
